basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Project Associate, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.post_name: Scientific Administrative Assistant, Senior Project Associate, Project Associate
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 5 Scientific Administrative Assistant, Senior Project Associate,Project Associate posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post.

qualification.education_qualification: BCA, MCA, or B.Tech in CSE/EE/ECE/IT or related, B.Tech/M.Tech in ECE/EE/CSE or related (GATE preferred), Ph.D. in CSE/ECE/EE or related
qualification.details: Scientific Administrative Assistant: Candidates must have completed BCA, MCA, or B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Information Technology, or related areas. Project Associate: Candidates must have completed B.Tech or M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, or related disciplines. Candidates with a valid GATE qualification will be preferred. Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or related areas.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientific Administrative Assistant: Candidates must have completed BCA, MCA, or B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Information Technology, or related areas. Project Associate: Candidates must have completed B.Tech or M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, or related disciplines. Candidates with a valid GATE qualification will be preferred. Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, or related areas.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Guwahati Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 is 16 July 2026. Candidates are advised to attend the walk-in interview on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: For the Project Associate position, candidates must have completed B.Tech or M.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, or related disciplines. A valid GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role is Rs. 68400 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be through an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Assam, Pin code: 781039.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.
